title: festuca ovina subsp. kamtschatica
intro: Festuca ovina subsp. kamtschatica, also known as Kamchatka fescue, is a subspecies of grass belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Festuca ovina subsp. kamtschatica include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and protecting against cell damage. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
